acquisition method: The proteome of the vesicular component of BALF was obtained by the shotgun approach.
cleavage agent: a solution of 10 ng/µL trypsin in 10% v/v ACN/20 mM ABC solution for protein digestion
collision energy: for collision-induced fragmentation with a normalized collision energy of 38%
instrument: connected to the nanoESI source of an LTQ Orbitrap Lumos Mass Spectrometer
ionization type: connected to the nanoESI source of an LTQ Orbitrap Lumos Mass Spectrometer
labeling: peptides of mono-dimensional gel digestion were analyzed by LC-MS/MS
reduction reagent: 1% w/v dithioerythritol (DTE) and trace amounts of bromophenol blue
reduction concentration: 1% w/v dithioerythritol (DTE) and trace amounts of bromophenol blue
